reviews.comment:
Paso un viernes a las 21:30hs. El mercado estaba cerrado, colas en los surtidores y el personal no alcanzaba para cubrir la demanda.

(Translated by Google)
I went on a Friday at 9:30 pm. The market was closed, there were queues at the pumps, and there weren't enough staff to meet the demand.
